description.en: Since ParamSpec captures both positional and keyword parameters, P.args and P.kwargs can be used to split a ParamSpec into its components. P.args represents the tuple of positional parameters in a given call and should only be used to annotate *args. P.kwargs represents the mapping of keyword parameters to their values in a given call, and should be only be used to annotate **kwargs. Both attributes require the annotated parameter to be in scope. At runtime, P.args and P.kwargs are instances ...

description.en: Deprecated alias to collections.abc.KeysView. Deprecated since version 3.9: collections.abc.KeysView now supports subscripting ([]). See PEP 585 and Generic Alias Type.
